mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daming_follows (follower_id, following_id, create_time) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE create_time = VALUES(create_time)
mapper.select: SELECT follower_id FROM daming_follows WHERE following_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT following_id FROM daming_follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
